name: Broiled Marinated Tofu Sandwich (Mf)
recipeIngredient: 4 thick slices whole wheat bread, lightly toasted
salt and freshly ground black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut tofu into 1-inch thick slices.
2. Drain the tofu slices.
3. Place the tofu slices on a sheet pan and cover with another baking pan or cookie sheet. Weigh down with something heavy to drain excess water for at least 30 minutes.
4. In a small cast iron skillet, toast cumin, chili powder, and oregano until aromatic. Remove from the pan and add olive oil, minced garlic, white wine vinegar, and dry white wine to a non-reactive saucepan. Bring to a simmer.
5. Transfer drained tofu slices to a ceramic or glass dish and pour marinade over them. Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 24 hours, up to 3-4 days.
6. Preheat the broiler.
7. Remove marinated tofu from the refrigerator and pat dry. Broil about 6 inches away from the heat until crispy on each side.
8. Spread mayonnaise on one slice of toasted bread. Place the tofu half-slices on top, followed by tomato, arugula, and red onion if desired.
9. Spread chili mayo on the second slice of toasted bread and cover the sandwich.
Yield: 2 servings
